data.body: 36c7 validated GREEN vs held-out oracle (14/14; teeth: neuter env gate -> 3 RED). Fixed 1 test bug (rebar.toml top-level [verify] not [tool.rebar.verify]) + reverted subagent's stale pyproject F401 ignore. 21dd AC2/5/8 fixes amended into change 703 (ebb6a03e5, Change-Id preserved). 36c7 committed a474f5ac1 (Change-Id Id3d839f). Stack pushed: 703 updated + 704 NEW. Running local make test (regression-safety for early-land) + polling both changes for votes.
